questions.question: Describe the primary function of a database management system. (3 marks)
questions.hint: A brief explanation of the role of a DBMS

questions.question: What is the difference between a relational database and a non-relational database? (5 marks)
questions.hint: A detailed explanation of the key differences between the two

questions.question: Explain the concept of normalization in database design. (5 marks)
questions.hint: A concise explanation of normalization and its importance
